semantic.role: Configuration resolution module for the experimental view layer and enabled views within the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Defines TypeScript interfaces for resolved view layer configuration (ResolvedExperimentalViewLayer, ResolvedEnabledViews).
Resolves the experimental view layer flag from project config, environment variable, or default.
Resolves the list of enabled view IDs from project config or default, normalizing and filtering unknown IDs.
outOfScope: Runtime orchestration of view services or engines.
Direct interaction with view rendering or UI components.
Persistence or storage of configuration data.
invariants: Pure configuration resolution with no side effects.
Depends on infra/config for project configuration and view-registry for view ID normalization.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a typed, centralized configuration resolution for the view layer, decoupling config sourcing from runtime logic.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Modularize CLI and decouple core infra services (as per git intent). This module likely supports decoupling by providing config resolution independent of runtime services.
